question_intent: Average goals against per game for goalies who played in the Campbell Conference in 1982

plan.question_intent: Average goals against per game for goalies who played in the Campbell Conference in 1982
plan.detail_query: SELECT leaf_1.tmid, leaf_1.year, leaf_1.g, leaf_1.ga, leaf_1.avg_goals_against_per_game FROM (SELECT g.tmid, g.year, t.g, t.ga, CAST(t.ga AS REAL) / CAST(t.g AS REAL) AS avg_goals_against_per_game FROM goalies g JOIN teams t ON g.tmid = t.tmid JOIN abbrev a ON t.confid = a.code WHERE (a.type = 'Conference') AND (a.fullname = 'Campbell Conference') AND (g.year = 1982)) AS leaf_1

blocks.name: leaf_1
blocks.select_clause: SELECT g.tmid, g.year, t.g, t.ga, CAST(t.ga AS REAL) / CAST(t.g AS REAL) AS avg_goals_against_per_game
join_clauses: JOIN teams t ON g.tmid = t.tmid
JOIN abbrev a ON t.confid = a.code
blocks.notes: Calculates average goals against per game for goalies who played in the Campbell Conference in 1982

blocks.name: root
blocks.notes: Final scalar block calculating the average of avg_goals_against_per_game from leaf_1

build_logs.notes: Calculates average goals against per game for goalies who played in the Campbell Conference in 1982

steps.clause: JOIN teams t ON g.tmid = t.tmid
steps.sql:
SELECT *
FROM goalies g
JOIN teams t ON g.tmid = t.tmid
LIMIT 5

steps.clause: JOIN abbrev a ON t.confid = a.code
steps.sql:
SELECT *
FROM goalies g
JOIN teams t ON g.tmid = t.tmid
JOIN abbrev a ON t.confid = a.code
LIMIT 5

SELECT *
FROM goalies g
JOIN teams t ON g.tmid = t.tmid
JOIN abbrev a ON t.confid = a.code
WHERE (a.type = 'Conference')
LIMIT 5

SELECT *
FROM goalies g
JOIN teams t ON g.tmid = t.tmid
JOIN abbrev a ON t.confid = a.code
WHERE (a.type = 'Conference') AND (a.fullname = 'Campbell Conference')
LIMIT 5

SELECT *
FROM goalies g
JOIN teams t ON g.tmid = t.tmid
JOIN abbrev a ON t.confid = a.code
WHERE (a.type = 'Conference') AND (a.fullname = 'Campbell Conference') AND (g.year = 1982)
LIMIT 5

SELECT *
FROM goalies g
JOIN teams t ON g.tmid = t.tmid
JOIN abbrev a ON t.confid = a.code
WHERE (a.type = 'Conference') AND (a.fullname = 'Campbell Conference') AND (g.year = 1982 OR g.year = 1983)
LIMIT 5

SELECT g.tmid, g.year, t.g, t.ga, CAST(t.ga AS REAL) / CAST(t.g AS REAL) AS avg_goals_against_per_game
FROM goalies g
JOIN teams t ON g.tmid = t.tmid
JOIN abbrev a ON t.confid = a.code
WHERE (a.type = 'Conference') AND (a.fullname = 'Campbell Conference') AND (g.year = 1982 OR g.year = 1983)

build_logs.notes: Final scalar block calculating the average of avg_goals_against_per_game from leaf_1

steps.sql:
SELECT *
FROM (SELECT g.tmid, g.year, t.g, t.ga, CAST(t.ga AS REAL) / CAST(t.g AS REAL) AS avg_goals_against_per_game
FROM goalies g
JOIN teams t ON g.tmid = t.tmid
JOIN abbrev a ON t.confid = a.code
WHERE (a.type = 'Conference') AND (a.fullname = 'Campbell Conference') AND (g.year = 1982 OR g.year = 1983)) AS leaf_1
LIMIT 5

SELECT AVG(leaf_1.avg_goals_against_per_game) AS avg_goals_against_per_game
FROM (SELECT g.tmid, g.year, t.g, t.ga, CAST(t.ga AS REAL) / CAST(t.g AS REAL) AS avg_goals_against_per_game
FROM goalies g
JOIN teams t ON g.tmid = t.tmid
JOIN abbrev a ON t.confid = a.code
WHERE (a.type = 'Conference') AND (a.fullname = 'Campbell Conference') AND (g.year = 1982 OR g.year = 1983)) AS leaf_1

nearest.sql:
SELECT AVG(leaf_1.ga_per_game) AS avg_ga_per_game
FROM (SELECT g.playerid, g.year, g.ga, g.gp, CAST(g.ga AS REAL) / CAST(g.gp AS REAL) AS ga_per_game
FROM goalies g
JOIN teams t ON g.tmid = t.tmid
JOIN abbrev a ON t.confid = a.code
WHERE (a.type = 'Conference') AND (a.fullname = 'Campbell Conference')) AS leaf_1

question: What is the average of the average goals allowed per game across all goalies in the Campbell Conference for the 1982 and 1983 seasons?
